description: Style NoteSuper soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game!Product DetailsBlack wallet that has a metallic push up clasp, inner zipped pocket, one insert pocket and six card holders on one side of the zipped pocket, two insert pockets and six card holders on the other side, stitch detailing and brand name on a metallic rim on the mouth of the walletMaterial and CareVintage leatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDimensions:11 cm x 21 cm
